basic_details.job_title: TN NHM Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 27 Intern, Consultant, Advisor Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu National Health Mission (TN NHM)
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu National Health Mission has released the official Intern, Consultant & Advisor Notification 2026 at the official website. A total of 27 vacancies have been announced under the TN NHM Intern, Consultant & Advisor Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with qualifications such as MPH / MHA / MSW, postgraduate degrees in Public Health / Health Management / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Informatics / Data Science / Public Policy, Biomedical Engineering / Medical Electronics, MBBS, or Engineering (IT / CSE) with MCA / M.Tech can apply online on or before 23 Ju

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: MPH / MHA / MSW, Postgraduate in Public Health / Health Management / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Informatics / Data Science / Public Policy, Bachelor’s or Master’s in Biomedical Engineering / Medical Electronics, Medical Graduate, Graduate in Engineering (IT / Computer Science / Software Engineering) with MCA / M.Tech
qualification.details: Intern: MPH / MHA / MSW or Postgraduate degree or diploma in Public Health, Health Management, Public Policy, Social Sciences, Epidemiology, or related disciplines Consultant – Health Technology Assessment (HTA): Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Biomedical Engineering / Medical Electronics / Biomedical Instrumentation / Medical Technology or Medical Graduate with postgraduate qualification in Health Technology Assessment / Health Economics / Public Health / Health Systems Consultant: Medical Graduate / Postgraduate degree in Public Health / Health Management / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Informatics / Data Science / Public Policy or related disciplines Consultant – Information Technology: Graduate in Engineering (Information Technology / Computer Science / Software Engineering) or equivalent with MCA / M.Tech in Computer Science / Information Technology / Postgraduate qualification in Public Health / Health Informatics / Health Systems / Health Management Advisor – Knowledge Management & Development (KMD): Medical Graduate and Postgraduate qualification in Public Health / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Management / Public Policy or equivalent Advisor – Health Systems Strengthening: Medical Graduate and Postgraduate qualification in Public Health / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Management / Public Policy or equivalent Advisor – Health Programmes & Innovations: Medical Graduate and Postgraduate qualification in Public Health / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Management / Public Policy or equivalent Advisor – Digital Health & Analytics: Postgraduate degree in Health Informatics / Public Health / Health Systems / Health Management with background in Information Technology, Computer Science, Data Science or Postgraduate degree in Computer Science / Information Technology / Data Science / Health Informatics

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TN NHM to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download TN NHM Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download TN NHM Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.tamil_nadu_national_health_mission_tn_nh: MPH / MHA / MSW, Postgraduate in Public Health / Health Management / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Informatics / Data Science / Public Policy, Bachelor’s or Master’s in Biomedical Engineering / Medical Electronics, Medical Graduate, Graduate in Engineering (IT / Computer Science / Software Engineering) with MCA / M.Tech

content_sections.heading: TN NHM Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TN NHM Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download TN NHM Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TN NHM Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Intern: MPH / MHA / MSW or Postgraduate degree or diploma in Public Health, Health Management, Public Policy, Social Sciences, Epidemiology, or related disciplines Consultant – Health Technology Assessment (HTA): Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Biomedical Engineering / Medical Electronics / Biomedical Instrumentation / Medical Technology or Medical Graduate with postgraduate qualification in Health Technology Assessment / Health Economics / Public Health / Health Systems Consultant: Medical Graduate / Postgraduate degree in Public Health / Health Management / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Informatics / Data Science / Public Policy or related disciplines Consultant – Information Technology: Graduate in Engineering (Information Technology / Computer Science / Software Engineering) or equivalent with MCA / M.Tech in Computer Science / Information Technology / Postgraduate qualification in Public Health / Health Informatics / Health Systems / Health Management Advisor – Knowledge Management & Development (KMD): Medical Graduate and Postgraduate qualification in Public Health / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Management / Public Policy or equivalent Advisor – Health Systems Strengthening: Medical Graduate and Postgraduate qualification in Public Health / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Management / Public Policy or equivalent Advisor – Health Programmes & Innovations: Medical Graduate and Postgraduate qualification in Public Health / Community Medicine / Preventive & Social Medicine / Health Management / Public Policy or equivalent Advisor – Digital Health & Analytics: Postgraduate degree in Health Informatics / Public Health / Health Systems / Health Management with background in Information Technology, Computer Science, Data Science or Postgraduate degree in Computer Science / Information Technology / Data Science / Health Informatics

content_sections.heading: TN NHM Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: TN NHM Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TN NHM to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TN NHM recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the TN NHM Intern, Consultant, and Advisor posts is 23rd July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this TN NHM recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 27 vacancies announced for the Intern, Consultant, and Advisor positions under the Tamil Nadu National Health Mission.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for TN NHM recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Intern post?
faq.answer: For the Intern position, candidates need to have an MPH / MHA / MSW or a Postgraduate degree or diploma in Public Health, Health Management, Public Policy, Social Sciences, Epidemiology, or related disciplines.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Consultant posts ranges from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 60,000 per month, depending on the specific consultant role and experience.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits for these posts. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any specific age criteria.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for TN NHM recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the TN NHM recruitment is entirely online. Candidates must submit their applications through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for contractual positions within the Tamil Nadu National Health Mission.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Tamil Nadu National Health Mission (TN NHM).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for TN NHM recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also find it on the official website of TN NHM.
